title: Cross-Platform Timer
description: Create a countdown timer that works on all platforms using Flow, with start, pause, and reset functionality.

hints.text: Store the timer job so you can cancel it on pause
Check isActive in the loop to respect cancellation
Set isFinished = true when remainingSeconds reaches 0

testCases.expectedBehavior: Pausing stops countdown, resuming continues from where it left off

instructions: Write the code according to the description.
